params.description: Whether to include spaces and bookable rooms in the event response.

params.description: Permission level to include in the event response. 0 = default = add mobile permissions; 1 = skip mobile permissions;

info.name: Retrieve a list of events that the user (specified via the token) has access to, with offset-based pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: The number of events to retrieve

params.name: offset
params.description: The starting point for pagination

params.name: name
params.description: Filter by name of the event

params.name: owner_id
params.description: Filter by the owner ID of the event

params.name: collaborator_id
params.description: Filter by collaborator who can access the event

params.name: industry_type
params.description: Filter by industry type of the event

params.name: start_date
params.description: Filter by start date (epoch time) of the event

params.name: end_date
params.description: Filter by end date (epoch time) of the event

params.name: last_activity
params.description: Filter by last activity date of the event

params.name: event_type
params.description: Filter by event type of the event

params.name: team_id
params.description: Filter by team ID of the user

params.name: space_id
params.description: Filter by space IDs of the diagrams in the event

params.name: sort_col
params.description: The field to sort by (e.g., name, start_date, end_date, etc.)

params.name: sort_dir
params.description: The sort direction to use (ASC or DESC)

params.name: date_filter
params.description: Convenience filter to get events that are upcoming, past, or all

params.name: space_template_ids
params.description: Space template IDs to filter by

params.name: bookable_room_ids
params.description: Bookable room IDs to filter by

params.name: event_platform
params.description: Filter by event platform type. Valid values: 'prismm' (events with prismm_occasion_id), 'ced' (events without prismm_occasion_id, default), or 'all' (no filtering)

params.name: event_ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of event UIDs to filter by

params.name: v2_event_ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of v2 (legacy) event IDs to filter by

items.docs: Retrieve a list of events that the user (specified via the token) has access to, with offset-based pagination

info.name: Accepts data about external events and persists them

items.docs:
This api creates a diagram in a specified room.
Unlike most of our other apis, this uses externally provided property and room ids instead of our ids, and requires coordination with our professional services team to map the rooms.
booking_id must be unique for each event and function_id must be unique for each diagram.
If you are interested in using this api, please contact your account manager or Cvent sales.
